title: Azure OpenAI Configuration
description: Configuration for Azure OpenAI integration for query explanation features

comments.setup: Create Azure OpenAI resource and deploy a model (gpt-4o recommended)
comments.endpointTypes: Two formats supported: Azure AI Foundry (services.ai.azure.com/api/projects/) OR classic Azure OpenAI Service (.openai.azure.com)
comments.apiKey: Found in Azure Portal > Azure OpenAI > Keys and Endpoint
comments.deploymentName: Required for classic Azure OpenAI Service. Leave empty for Azure AI Foundry (model is included in project endpoint)
comments.apiVersion: Required for classic Azure OpenAI (e.g., 2024-08-01-preview). Leave empty for Azure AI Foundry
comments.temperature: Lower values (0.0-0.5) for more focused/deterministic explanations
